Name: Protagonist_DrCarter
BackgroundStory: Renowned paleontologist specializing in Mesozoic ecosystems. Was investigating unusual geological formations when she discovered the temporal gem.
UniqueFeatures: Small scar above left eyebrow from fieldwork accident, calloused hands from excavation work

Name: Survivor_Marcus
BackgroundStory: Quantum physicist who arrived 3 months ago. Has been hiding in cave systems, studying the temporal anomalies.
UniqueFeatures: Beard grown wild, multiple small scars from predator encounters, nervous tic in left eye

Name: Survivor_Sarah
BackgroundStory: Former wildlife photographer and survival expert. Has been in the Jurassic world for 8 months, longest surviving human found so far.
UniqueFeatures: Claw marks across right shoulder, sun-weathered skin, improvised leather armor pieces

Name: Echo_Shaman
BackgroundStory: A shaman from 30,000 years ago who was transported forward in time. Understands the temporal gems' power through spiritual connection.
UniqueFeatures: Ritual scars on face and arms, bone jewelry, primitive tattoos using natural pigments

Name: Echo_Knight
BackgroundStory: 13th century Crusader knight who touched a gem in the Holy Land. Believes he's in purgatory and must prove his worth.
UniqueFeatures: Battle scars from medieval combat, cross tattoo on chest, missing little finger from sword fight

Name: Hostile_Cultist
BackgroundStory: Modern era physicist who became obsessed with temporal travel. Leads a small cult that worships the gems as divine artifacts.
UniqueFeatures: Self-inflicted ritual scars, wild eyes, branded symbols on forearms

Name: Generic_Researcher
BackgroundStory: Various academic backgrounds - geologists, biologists, archaeologists who found temporal gems during research expeditions.
UniqueFeatures: Varies - glasses, academic posture, soft hands unused to manual labor

Name: Generic_Explorer
BackgroundStory: Professional guides, park rangers, adventure tour operators who encountered gems in remote locations.
UniqueFeatures: Varies - weathered skin, equipment marks, outdoor gear tan lines

Name: Generic_Military
BackgroundStory: Military personnel from various eras and conflicts who encountered temporal gems during operations or expeditions.
UniqueFeatures: Varies - military bearing, combat scars, regulation haircuts, dog tags
